title: Neural correlates and dynamical brain states of creative insight in a spatial problem task.

assets.abstract: Insight problem-solving is a creative cognitive process that involves overcoming mental impasses and discovering novel solutions. However, the neural mechanisms underlying insight, particularly in spatial manipulation task remain poorly understood. In this study, we investigated the brain dynamics involved in solving matchstick arithmetic problems, a type of spatial insight problem, using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI).
